attributes.goo_lib.lava_movement_efficie: Affects how fast you swim in lava, relative to ground speed
attributes.goo_lib.lifesteal.desc: Returns a portion of the post-mitigation damage as health
attributes.goo_lib.draw_speed.desc: Affects how fast a Bow is drawn
attributes.goo_lib.arrow_velocity.desc: Affects how fast an arrow is shot out
attributes.goo_lib.arrow_damage.desc: Affects the final damage of arrows
attributes.goo_lib.critical_damage.desc: Multiplier on how much damage is done in a Critical Hit
attributes.goo_lib.xp_gain.desc: Multiplier on how much experience you gain from breaking blocks, killing mobs, smelting items, fishing, grindstone usage, advancements, breeding animals and experience bottles
attributes.goo_lib.villager_reputation.d: Affects the sale price of trades, as well as natural Iron Golem hostility
attributes.goo_lib.healing_received.desc: Multiplier on how much healing is received
